meta.title: Laundry Service Omiš & Tugare | Lessive Studio — apartments, hotels, delivery
meta.ogTitle: Laundry Service Omiš & Tugare | Lessive Studio
meta.description: Industrial laundry in Tugare near Omiš. Washing of bed linen and towels for apartments and villas on the Poljica Riviera, dry cleaning and commercial laundry for hotels and restaurants, with delivery across Omiš, Dugi Rat and Split.
meta.ogImageAlt: Industrial laundry facility — Lessive Studio Tugare

hero.lead: Specialised in apartments and villas on the Poljica Riviera — with reliable processing for hotels, restaurants and other hospitality businesses too.

steps.serviceDescription: Timely delivery of finished textiles straight to your property.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.annotation: ANSWERS / SERVICES, DELIVERY AND SERVICE AREA
faq.footerNote: CAN'T FIND YOUR ANSWER? GET IN TOUCH — SECTION /12/

items.question: Where is your laundry located?
items.answer: Our industrial facility is at Trg poljičkih knezova 1, 21252 Tugare, in the heart of Poljica above Omiš. We are just a few minutes' drive from Omiš and Dugi Rat and about twenty minutes from Split, so we cover the entire Poljica Riviera and the surrounding area.

items.question: Do you offer delivery and pickup of laundry in Omiš, Split and the surrounding area?
items.answer: Yes. We collect and deliver laundry free of charge within a 15 km radius of our facility in Tugare, which includes Omiš, Dugi Rat, Stanići, Mimice, Krilo Jesenice, Podstrana and the suburbs of Split. For more distant locations on the Makarska Riviera and in Split we arrange delivery on a schedule.

items.question: Do you wash bed linen and towels for apartments and holiday homes?
items.answer: Apartments and villas are our priority. We specialise in washing, drying and ironing bed linen sets, sheets, pillowcases and towels for hosts on the Poljica Riviera. In season we offer fast turnover between bookings with a 24-hour turnaround so your units are always ready for new guests.

items.question: How quickly can I get my laundry back?
items.answer: The standard turnaround is 24 hours. For urgent situations we offer same-day delivery, ideal when an apartment or villa has an unannounced guest changeover. The express service is charged at a surcharge on the base price.

items.question: Do you work with hotels, restaurants and other hospitality businesses?
items.answer: Yes. Alongside apartments we regularly maintain textiles for hotels, restaurants, taverns and cafés around Omiš and Split — tablecloths, napkins, workwear, uniforms and kitchen cloths. For hospitality businesses we offer monthly packages with a fixed price and a regular pickup schedule.

items.question: Do you offer dry cleaning of delicate materials?
items.answer: We do. In addition to industrial laundry we also dry clean curtains, carpets, blankets, duvets and delicate fabrics that cannot be washed conventionally. We can collect and return carpets and curtains together with your regular laundry delivery.

items.question: Do you use eco-friendly washing products?
items.answer: Yes. On request we wash with eco-friendly products that are safe for children, allergy sufferers and sensitive skin, while also saving water and energy. This is especially valued by families with children and by hosts who want to offer guests hygienically impeccable yet gentle textiles.

items.question: How is the price determined and are there discounts for regular clients?
items.answer: Prices are transparent and listed per item in our price list, and all of them include VAT. Regular clients — apartments, villas and hospitality businesses — receive up to 15% off through an annual subscription and fixed monthly packages. For larger volumes and seasonal cooperation we prepare a tailored quote.

items.question: What are your opening hours?
items.answer: The facility in Tugare is open Monday to Friday from 08:00 to 18:00 and on Saturday from 08:00 to 14:00, while it is closed on Sundays. You can see the current facility status based on opening hours live on the site, in the Location section.

items.question: How can I request a quote or arrange cooperation?
items.answer: Fill in the enquiry form in the Contact section or call us on +385 21 123 456, or write to info@lessive-tugare.hr. We will get back to you with a quote tailored to the type of textile, quantities and deadlines, whether you run a single apartment or an entire portfolio of accommodation units.
